payload.description: Bridge flag repairs on Harlem, Hudson, New Haven-NY, and Port Jervis lines. Typical repairs include replacing deteriorated members, rebuilding deteriorated bridge seats, repairing abutment walls, repairing load bearing supports, timber deck replacements.
